task_completion.description: Log into LibreHealth EHR as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR main dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (often showing the user logged in as 'admin').

task_completion.description: Locate and open the record for patient Erin Warren.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard, summary screen, or search results for 'Erin Warren' (PID: 2) is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the demographics or contact information edit screen for Erin Warren.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editable web form for patient demographics or contact info is open, specifically for Erin Warren.

task_completion.description: Enter the new Home Phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Home Phone' or equivalent contact input field contains the exact value '617-555-0233'.
The 'Email' input field contains the exact value 'updated.contact@healthmail.test'.
The 'City' input field contains the exact value 'Boston'.
A success message indicating the patient record was saved, or the read-only patient summary screen displaying the newly updated phone, email, and city values.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with LibreHealth EHR.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating the LibreHealth EHR graphical user interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or SQL to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing MySQL commands, curl requests, or script executions modifying the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of typing into the actual LibreHealth EHR web forms, rather than editing a local HTML file or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is Erin Warren (PID: 2). The required updates are: Home Phone = '617-555-0233', Email = 'updated.contact@healthmail.test', and City = 'Boston'. The agent must log in using admin credentials and make these changes via the LibreHealth EHR web interface.
